title: Brazilian Fields Reworked
description: A big brazil themed mod, adds a new dimension, new artifacts, new blocks,new items, new mobs, and more!!
body:
![cool bar to make it better totally not a abnormals bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498ba9296ea0386969c371d642e4bfe62b526795.png)

![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67efbe17a527c0cbba2e00363e000c9361b121fe.png)

![cool bar to make it better totally not a abnormals bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498ba9296ea0386969c371d642e4bfe62b526795.png)

🇧🇷 About: 🇧🇷

The Brazilian Minecraft Mod!, features a new brazilian themed dimension with lots of content to explore, with everything you can imagine, from new mobs, new structures, new blocks, items, and more!

REQUIRES GECKOLIB AND CURIOS!!

![cool bar to make it better totally not a abnormals bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498ba9296ea0386969c371d642e4bfe62b526795.png)

📦 Cross-Compatibility: 📦
- Neapolitan
- Trials Chambers
- Easter Island

![cool bar to make it better totally not a abnormals bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498ba9296ea0386969c371d642e4bfe62b526795.png)
